segments.text: These are not made of paper and definitely not plastic. It is actually made from the exact same thing that poisons Delhi's air every winter. It is
rice husk. The waste after getting rice grains. But that is not the crucial part. The problem is what happens after that. Farmers don't know how to get rid
of that. So they burn millions of tons of husk every year. It creates this massive parali smoke that chokes the entire city. So instead of burning it,
they rescued it. After compressing the waste, they effectively turn this toxic smoke into this rock hard reusable cups.
But still, there is a challenge. At a concert, people are lazy. So, how do you stop them from throwing these away like garbage? You bribe them. They offered
free unlimited water refills only if you have the cup. That's an amazing idea for an amazing
